title: Device Home Screen - Default Quick Settings
scenario: Verify that the Device Home Screen displays the first three settings from the settings screen as quick settings under the device image after pairing.
steps: Pair a device with the app.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
Observe the quick settings displayed under the device's image.
expected: Three quick settings should be displayed under the device's image, and they should always be the first three options from the settings screen.
